# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function factorial: int (n: int)
  entry:
      result_1 = 1
      i_1 = 1
      JUMP L1
  L1:
      i_2 = PHI (i_1, entry), (i_3, L2)
      result_2 = PHI (result_1, entry), (result_3, L2)
      t1 = CMP_LE i_2, n_1
      JUMP_IF_NOT t1, L3
      JUMP L2
  L2:
      t2 = MUL result_2, i_2
      result_3 = t2
      t3 = ADD i_2, 1
      i_3 = t3
      JUMP L1
  L3:
      RETURN result_2

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t4 = CALL factorial, 5
      RETURN t4
